title: oldenlandia oligantha
intro: Oldenlandia oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered Oldenlandia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oldenlandia oligantha include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is said to have a cooling effect on the body, making it a popular remedy for hot summer days.
